tagline: Buffalo's Premier Swimming Pool Service & Maintenance

hero.headline:
Your Pool, Perfect. Every
Single Week.
hero.subheadline: You bought a pool to relax — not to spend weekends testing chemicals and scrubbing walls. 716 Pool Service handles every detail so you can skip the chores and just dive in.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool Care From<br class="hidden md:block"> Opening to Closing
services.subtitle: From the first warm day of spring to the last leaf of fall, we keep your pool pristine so you never have to think about it.

cards.title: Pool Openings
cards.description: Complete spring opening — cover removal, equipment dewinterization, deck blowoff, vacuuming, brushing, and shocking. Swim-ready in one visit.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Maintenance
cards.description: Water testing, chemical balancing, vacuuming, skimming, brushing, and equipment checks. Your pool stays crystal clear every single week.

cards.title: Pool Closings
cards.description: Full winterization including line blowouts, equipment protection, and winter cover installation. Your pool stays safe all off-season.

cards.title: Pool Inspections
cards.description: Buying a home with a pool? Our professional inspection evaluates equipment condition, structural integrity, and overall functionality before you close.

cards.title: General Maintenance & Repairs
cards.description: On-call service for equipment issues, water chemistry problems, and general upkeep. We diagnose fast and fix it right the first time.

cards.title: Water Chemistry Management
cards.description: Precise chemical balancing that keeps water safe, sparkling, and gentle on skin. We teach you what we do so you understand your pool better.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Worry-Free Pool

steps.title: Request Your Free Quote
steps.description: Tell us about your pool — size, type, what you need. We'll get back to you within 24 hours with an honest, no-pressure quote.

steps.title: We Take Care of Everything
steps.description: Matt and the 716 crew arrive on schedule, fully equipped. We handle cleaning, chemicals, equipment — and explain what we're doing along the way.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Pool All Season
steps.description: Your pool stays swim-ready from opening day to closing day. If something's ever off, we come back and make it right — that's our promise.

about.label: Why WNY Trusts 716 Pool Service
about.headline: Owner-Operated. Personally Accountable. Always Thorough.
about.description: 716 Pool Service was built on a simple idea: pool owners deserve service they can actually count on. Matt Duve leads every job with the same hands-on attention — whether it's your first opening or your fiftieth weekly visit. With over 10 years of combined experience across the WNY area, our crew doesn't just clean your pool. We teach you about your equipment and water chemistry so you feel confident all season long.

features.title: Owner on Every Job
features.description: Matt personally oversees every service visit. You're never handed off to a random subcontractor — you get the same trusted crew every time.

features.title: Educational Approach
features.description: We don't just fix problems — we explain them. Our team helps you understand your pool equipment and water chemistry so you're never in the dark.

features.title: 5-Star Satisfaction Guarantee
features.description: 64 customers gave us a perfect 5.0 rating for a reason. If you're not completely satisfied, we come back and make it right at no charge.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every pool is different — request your custom quote and we'll give you an honest price with no hidden fees.

guarantee.headline: Our "Perfect Pool" Promise
guarantee.description: If you're not 100% satisfied with any service visit, call us and we'll come back to make it right at no extra charge. No fine print, no runaround. 64 five-star reviews don't happen by accident — they happen because we stand behind every single visit.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start service?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are scheduled within the same week. For urgent situations like a green pool or equipment failure, we do our best to get there within 24–48 hours. Just give us a call.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during service?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Most clients provide gate access and we handle everything while you're away. You'll always know what was done — we communicate clearly after every visit.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve all of Western New York including Buffalo, Clarence, Amherst, Williamsville, Lancaster, Orchard Park, Hamburg, and surrounding WNY communities.

faqs.question: Do you service all types of pools?
faqs.answer: Yes — inground, above-ground, saltwater, chlorine, vinyl, fiberglass, and concrete. Whatever you've got, our crew has the experience to maintain it properly.

faqs.question: Can you help me understand my pool equipment?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. That's one of our specialties. We take an educational approach and walk you through how your pump, filter, heater, and chemical systems work so you feel confident between visits.

testimonials.name: Jennifer J.
testimonials.text: Communication was excellent — they were responsive, professional, and easy to work with. The owner personally addressed equipment issues, demonstrating exceptional customer service.

testimonials.name: John W.
testimonials.text: Matt and the team at 716 Pool Service are excellent. Their spring cleaning work completed tasks efficiently that would have taken a full weekend of repeated labor.

testimonials.name: Christopher B.
testimonials.text: Excellent communication prior to appointment, very professional, knowledgeable about all aspects of pool service. A three-person crew delivered impressive results quickly.

contact.headline:
Ready for a Pool You
Never Have to Worry About?
contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-pressure quote within 24 hours. No contracts, no commitments — just honest service from a crew that treats your pool like their own.
benefits: Free pool assessment with every quote
